entry.title: IDC SAQMMA10D0104 (M010) awarded to TRIPLE CANOPY INC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF THIS NO COST MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE REVISION 01 TO SECTION I - CONTRACT CLAUSES AND REVISION 04 TO EXHIBIT C - PERSONNEL RESPONSIBILITIES AND QUALIFICATIONS. BOTH REVISIONS ARE DATED NOVEMBER 2013.
1. SECTION I IS REVISED TO INCORPORATE FAR 52.232-18 AVAILABILITY OF FUNDS (APRIL 1984); AND
2. EXHIBIT C IS REVISED TO AUTHORIZE ACCEPTANCE OF AEMT CERTIFICATIONS FOR THE EMT-I LABOR CATEGORY QUALIFICATIONS.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:manufacturingOrganizationType.description: FOREIGN-OWNED BUSINESS INCORPORATED IN THE U.S.

entry.title: IDC SAQMMA10D0104 (M011) awarded to TRIPLE CANOPY INC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE: (1) REVISION 02 TO EXHIBIT A GENERAL PROVISIONS, DATED APRIL 2014; AND (2) REVISION 01 TO SECTION B.10, OTHER DIRECT COST/MATERIALS CONTRACT LINE ITEM NUMBERS (CLINS).
REVISION 02 TO EXHIBIT A PROVIDES FOR THE UTILIZATION OF THE ELECTRONIC QUESTIONNAIRES FOR INVESTIGATION PROCESSING (E-QIP) SYSTEM IN THE SUBMISSION OF STANDARD FORM 85P/PS QUESTIONNAIRE FOR THIRD COUNTRY NATIONAL (TCN) POSITIONS.
REVISION 01 TO SECTION B PROVIDES FOR THE ADDITION OF A NEW LINE ITEM. CLIN X309, TCN E-QIP ADMINISTRATION, IS HEREBY ADDED TO SECTION B.10 OTHER DIRECT COST/MATERIALS CONTRACT LINE ITEM NUMBERS (CLINS).

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:manufacturingOrganizationType.description: FOREIGN-OWNED BUSINESS INCORPORATED IN THE U.S.

entry.title: IDC SAQMMA10D0104 (M012) awarded to TRIPLE CANOPY INC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF THIS UNILATERAL MODIFICATION IS TO EXERCISE OPTION YEAR 04 OF THE BASE CONTRACT, PURSUANT TO FAR 52.217-9 OPTION TO EXTEND THE TERM OF THE CONTRACT. THE PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE FOR THIS OPTION YEAR IS SEPTMBER 29, 2014 SEPTEMBER 28, 2015.
INCORPORATED UNDER THIS MODIFICATION IS AN ADMINISTRATIVE CHANGE (I.E. 52.243-3 CHANGES-TIME-AND-MATERIALS OR LABOR- HOURS SEP 2000) THE REQUIREMENT FOR RECRUITMENT OF THIRD COUNTY NATIONALS FOR PERFORMANCE ON DEPARTMENT OF STATE CONTRACTS (DATED OCTOBER 17, 2012) ALONG WITH THE ASSOCIATED OIG EMPLOYEE INTERVIEW QUESTIONNAIRE.
ALL OTHER TERMS AND CONDITIONS REMAIN THE SAME.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:manufacturingOrganizationType.description: FOREIGN-OWNED BUSINESS INCORPORATED IN THE U.S.

entry.title: IDC SAQMMA10D0104 (M015) awarded to TRIPLE CANOPY INC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: MODIFICATION 15: THIS MODIFICATION EXERCISES FAR CLAUSE 52.217-8 OPTION TO EXTEND SERVICES (NOV 1999) FOR AN ADDITIONAL SIX (6) MONTHS, THEREBY EXTENDING THE PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE THROUGH 03/28/2016.
